meaning: n.<主美>良好状态,顺利,平衡
examples: His views are out of kilter with world opinion.
Her lifestyle was out of kilter with her politics.
Long flights throw my sleeping pattern out of kilter for days.
But an off-kilter entry knocked them off course, to finish without a medal in fourth place.
"The punishments for computer crimes are seriously off-kilter, and congress needs to fix them, " she added.
